page_content:
Prerequisite: EPIB301.

EPIB399 Epidemiology and Biostatistics Independent Study (1-3 Credits) The EPIB undergraduate independent study is an opportunity for undergraduates from other departments in the SPH or the university to work with an Epidemiology and Biostatistics faculty member on research or special projects that are based out of EPIB.

Restriction: Must have earned a minimum of 60 credits; and minimum cumulative GPA of 3.0.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
